prediction_accuracy.name: Prediction Accuracy
prediction_accuracy.definition: The ratio of correct directional predictions to the total scored predictions.
prediction_accuracy.cold_start_behaviour: Highly volatile, requires at least 30 evaluation points to stabilize.
prediction_accuracy.interpretation: Primary directional effectiveness metric. Higher is better.

confidence_calibration_error.name: Confidence Calibration Error
confidence_calibration_error.definition: The Mean Absolute Error between predicted conviction/confidence and the realized score.
confidence_calibration_error.cold_start_behaviour: Unreliable when data points are scarce. Expected to drop over time.

knowledge_debt.name: Knowledge Debt
knowledge_debt.definition: The backlog of unexplained observations, candidate principles, and open questions.
knowledge_debt.formula: Unexplained Obs + Active Open Questions + Uncovered Theories + Candidate Backlog
knowledge_debt.cold_start_behaviour: Starts higher and decreases as general principles are consolidated.
knowledge_debt.interpretation: Measures explanatory completeness of the substrate. Lower is better.

principle_coverage.name: Principle Coverage
principle_coverage.definition: The proportion of historical generated theories explaining component behaviors covered by active/stable principles.
principle_coverage.cold_start_behaviour: 0.0 in cold-start. Increases as candidate principles are validated.
principle_coverage.interpretation: Measures coverage power of principles. Higher is better.

memory_reuse_rate.name: Memory Reuse Rate
memory_reuse_rate.definition: Percentage of steps where prior extracted lessons were successfully recalled and applied.
memory_reuse_rate.formula: Steps with Reused Lessons / Total Replayed Steps
memory_reuse_rate.cold_start_behaviour: 0.0 initially, grows as historical lesson database matures.
memory_reuse_rate.interpretation: Measures memory exploitation. Higher is better.

regime_recall_hit_rate.name: Regime Recall Hit Rate
regime_recall_hit_rate.definition: The proportion of steps where analog matching found prior matching regimes above the similarity threshold.
regime_recall_hit_rate.formula: Steps with Recall Sim >= 0.8 / Total Replayed Steps
regime_recall_hit_rate.cold_start_behaviour: Low or zero initially, increases as experience is accumulated.
regime_recall_hit_rate.interpretation: Measures retrieval recall efficiency. Higher is better.

memory_retrieval_usefulness.name: Memory Retrieval Usefulness
memory_retrieval_usefulness.definition: Average score indicating how useful the retrieved analog regime matches were to the active decision policy.
memory_retrieval_usefulness.cold_start_behaviour: Low, expected to stabilize with historical analogs.
memory_retrieval_usefulness.interpretation: Measures quality of retrieved analogs. Higher is better.

prediction_drift.name: Prediction Drift
prediction_drift.definition: The rate at which the directional bias predictions switch direction day-over-day.
prediction_drift.cold_start_behaviour: Volatile initially. Stabilizes under coherent market regimes.
prediction_drift.interpretation: Measures prediction stability. High drift indicates low conviction shifts.

theory_drift.name: Theory Drift
theory_drift.definition: The rate at which active theory lines of lineage mutate, merge, or retire.
theory_drift.cold_start_behaviour: Higher at start as theories are generated frequently. Decreases with stability.
theory_drift.interpretation: Measures cognitive conceptual stability. Lower is better.

active_principles.name: Active Principles
active_principles.definition: Total number of non-retired principles currently held in active or stable status.
active_principles.cold_start_behaviour: 0 in cold-start. Grows as candidate principles complete backtesting.
active_principles.interpretation: Measures the richness of the active world model library.

asset_local_principles.name: Asset-local Principles
asset_local_principles.definition: Principles that are unique to a single asset and not shared globally.
asset_local_principles.formula: Count(Active Principles not found in generalized_principles)
asset_local_principles.cold_start_behaviour: Initially low, expected to represent asset-specific quirks.
asset_local_principles.interpretation: Measures asset-specific adaptations of the cognitive loop.

shared_principles.name: Shared Principles
shared_principles.definition: Principles that apply across multiple assets targeting the same component.
shared_principles.formula: Count(Active Principles matching generalized_principles target components)
shared_principles.cold_start_behaviour: 0 in cold-start, increases as common market physics are discovered.
shared_principles.interpretation: Measures shared dynamics across different symbols.

canonical_principles.name: Canonical Principles
canonical_principles.definition: High-confidence generalized principles promoted to stable/trusted/canonical status.
canonical_principles.cold_start_behaviour: 0 in cold-start. Takes longest to mature.
canonical_principles.interpretation: Measures core physics of the system. Higher is better.

failure_similarity.name: Failure Similarity
failure_similarity.definition: Proportion of mechanism failures that are systemic (occur across >= 50% of assets).
failure_similarity.cold_start_behaviour: Highly volatile. Requires failures to be observed on multiple assets.
failure_similarity.interpretation: Measures if assets share underlying failure modes.

principle_similarity.name: Principle Similarity
principle_similarity.definition: Proportion of active principles that have been generalized across multiple assets.
principle_similarity.cold_start_behaviour: 0.0 in cold-start. Increases as common rules are abstracted.
principle_similarity.interpretation: Measures generalization power of the induction engine.

world_model_similarity.name: World Model Similarity
world_model_similarity.definition: The degree of overlap in constrained market regimes across asset world models.
world_model_similarity.formula: Regimes Constrained in >= 2 Assets / Total Unique Constrained Regimes
world_model_similarity.cold_start_behaviour: 0.0 in cold-start, increases as common regime restrictions form.

memory_behaviour.name: Memory Behaviour
memory_behaviour.definition: Average lesson reuse rate across all evaluated assets.
memory_behaviour.cold_start_behaviour: Low, expected to grow as history database is populated.
memory_behaviour.interpretation: Measures general memory behavior of the system.

weighted_generalization_score.name: Weighted Generalization Score
weighted_generalization_score.definition: Comprehensive generalization index combining failure, principle, world model, and memory similarity components.
weighted_generalization_score.formula: 0.3 * Failure Similarity + 0.3 * Principle Similarity + 0.2 * World Model Similarity + 0.2 * Memory Behaviour
weighted_generalization_score.cold_start_behaviour: Low (under 10%) for cold-start runs. Increases with mature long replays.
weighted_generalization_score.interpretation: Ultimate measure of cross-asset cognitive transfer. Higher is better.
